definitions.text: The part of the body of an animal or human which contains the brain, mouth, and main sense organs.
examples: Be careful when you pet that dog on the head; it may bite.
The company is looking for people with good heads for business.

definitions.text: To do with heads. Mental or emotional aptitude or skill.
examples: The company is looking for people with good heads for business.
He has no head for heights.

definitions.text: Of, relating to, or intended for the head.
To be in command of. (See also head up.)
examples: Who heads the board of trustees?
to head an army, an expedition, or a riot

definitions.text: To come at the beginning or front of; to commence.
examples: A group of clowns headed the procession.
The most important items headed the list.

definitions.text: Placed at the top or the front.
